featureCoverage.label: AI Feature Management
notes: Admin UI, server contract and permission scaffolds will be generated in the DRAFT plugin.
Database compatibility must be confirmed through the separate PowerShell package before publish.
Imported AI capability will be connected to the existing AI gateway where possible; provider configuration remains mandatory.

decisions.label: AI Feature Management
decisions.reason: Required Admin management was not detected.
decisions.output: Generate list/create/edit management with fields: name, provider, model, promptKey, featureFlag, tenantScope, storeScope, enabled.

decisions.label: Responsive behavior
decisions.reason: Responsive foundation was detected.
decisions.output: Keep current responsive behavior unchanged.

warnings: Source project is highly incomplete; generated output will require extended review.
steps: Reuse platform-owned routes, components, APIs and Admin modules.
Convert imported JS/JSX and framework-specific routes to current TypeScript/Next.js conventions.
Merge partial pages and components without redesigning complete source sections.
Generate missing pages, components and Admin management forms.
Connect current real APIs through adapters and preserve tenant/store isolation.
Implement imported AI features that are missing from the current platform.
Apply responsive preserve/repair/generate decision across the viewport matrix.
Generate a separate PowerShell package for approved database/schema work.
Generate a DRAFT code-only Plugin ZIP and require sandbox validation before install.
